kill_fact: No outright kill, but the asymmetry survives only as a SOFT, undated, non-binding regulatory-perception event — not a hard catalyst. Re-verified as of 29-Jun-2026: the trigger is qualitative FDA feedback on whether an accelerated-approval (surrogate-endpoint) path is viable for WVE-006 in AATD, on a self-set 'mid-2026' window with NO scheduled meeting date and NO PDUFA (none applies pre-filing). Wave's own 28-Apr-2026 Q1 release says feedback 'continues to be expected mid-2026' and it has NOT been received; no 8-K/PR disclosing any FDA outcome exists. The ask is genuinely novel — the FDA has never formally established a surrogate endpoint for AATD — so even pristine M-AAT/Z-AAT biomarker data can be met with 'show me clinical outcomes,' which guts the accelerated-approval thesis. This is a single regulatory binary on an unproven framework, not a contractual payout, and the bull's 'clean non-diluter funded through the event' framing is true only for THIS window: WVE priced a $350M upsized offering at $19.00 in Dec-2025, so the register is a serial diluter and the floor is solvency-backed, not a no-dilution guarantee.
corrections: (1) Catalyst is SOFT/undated, not hard-dated: 'mid-2026' is management guidance with no scheduled date; real risk of drift to year-end leaving dead money. (2) The floor is a MODEL floor, not contractual: net cash ~$2.83/sh ($544.6M / ~192.3M shares, no debt, runway into 3Q-2028 — all primary-source confirmed); the $3.50 'floor' adds discretionary platform/pipeline residual and can break toward net cash (or below, on a risk-off XBI tape). Live price $5.81 already trades ABOVE the $3.50 floor and well above net cash, so optionality is partly in the tape — true downside to net cash is ~-51%, wider than the -40% the bull cites. (3) 'No dilution' is window-only — WVE is a serial diluter ($350M at $19 in Dec-2025); a disappointing print removes the dilution restraint. (4) The event is pathway feedback (route/timing de-risk), NOT approval — the $11 is a probabilistic re-rate, not a deal-certain payoff.
evidence: Wave Life Sciences Q1 2026 results, 28-Apr-2026: '$544.6 million' cash at 31-Mar-2026, runway 'into the third quarter of 2028', 'Regulatory feedback on accelerated approval pathway for WVE-006 continues to be expected mid-2026' (not yet received), no going-concern flag (globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/28/3282474; ir.wavelifesciences.com Q1-2026 release)

Wave Life Sciences SEC Form 10-Q (period ended 31-Mar-2026): 192,337,566 common shares issued and outstanding => ~$2.83/sh net cash (sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001631574/000119312526183587/wve-20260331.htm)

Wave Life Sciences PR, 02-Feb-2026: regained full WVE-006 rights from GSK to accelerate engagement on a potential FDA accelerated-approval pathway for AATD; feedback expected mid-2026 (ir.wavelifesciences.com/news-releases/news-release-details/wave-life-sciences-announces-plans-accelerate-regulatory)

Wave Life Sciences PR, Dec-2025: priced upsized $350M public offering at $19.00 (serial-diluter register; contradicts clean-non-diluter framing). Independent search 29-Jun-2026: no 8-K/PR disclosing any FDA accelerated-approval outcome for WVE-006 — catalyst confirmed live and UN-FIRED, soft window
